subcodes.first_line: O ye friends of God! From the gems of the words of the Lord of manifest signs doth flow the spring of inner meanings, and from the essence of utterance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای احبای الهی از جواهر کلمات رب الایات البینات معین معانی جاری و از هویت کلام
subcodes.subjects: @station; mission; authority of Abdu'l-Baha, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @infallibility; sinlessness ['ismat], @firmness in the Covenant
